front.title: MOCHA Identity: Authentication, Authorization, and Federation

abstract.t: This document specifies identity, authentication, authorization, and federation for MOCHA (MoQ Open Communication & Hosting Architecture). It defines how users authenticate with Identity Providers (IdPs), how authorization tokens (C4M and Privacy Pass) are issued and validated at relays, how permissions map to MOQT namespaces, and how users from one Provider obtain access to resources on a federated Provider.
